reviews.comment:
Me informan en ACA Salta que para sacar el carnet internacional hay que llevar dos fotos carnet idénticas y actualizadas, original y fotocopia del DNI y de la Lic. de conducir que tengan idéntico domicilio o por lo menos de la misma ciudad. Hasta hoy junio/2019 se paga $970 y la atención es de Lunes a Viernes de 9 a 17:30 hs.

(Translated by Google)
I've been informed at ACA Salta that to obtain an international driving permit, you need to bring two identical and recent passport photos, the original and a photocopy of your ID and driver's license, both of which must show the same address or at least be from the same city. As of June 2019, the fee is $970, and service is available Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrLUlxbXNnRRAB
